headline: ResMed Inc (NYSE:RMD) Offers a Quality Dividend Built on Strong Profitability and Financial Health
summary: Discover how the Best Dividend Stocks screen identifies sustainable payers like ResMed (RMD), combining high dividend ratings with strong profitability and health ratings for long-term stability.
